decision_row: D-M19-3 CONTACT LAYER — screw_lift stops by real contact
contact_map: === CONTACT MAP (①/②/③ doctrine) — collision enabled ONLY for class-② limit carriers ===
② platform×top_collar        COLLIDE  — TOP stop = thread-runout shoulder (full stroke) (verified by real contact)
② platform×bottom_stop       COLLIDE  — BOTTOM landing on the base frame (s=0) (verified by real contact)
② platform×guide_columns     (dof)    — realized by the declared joint + fit clearance (no LIMIT to carry)
① screw×nut_thread           EXCLUDED — driving helical thread flank = R2b curved contact; V-B deferred (m17/D-M1-7)
— coupling_hub×crank         EXCLUDED — rigid grip, fused to the input shaft (m20) — no contact pair

overcrank.note: subsumes the m22 overcrank probe: driven past target, the collar stops it; then lowered to the base landing
